name: Fruit and Sour Cream Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred cabbage very fine and place it in a covered bowl or plastic bag. Chill.
2. To make the dressing: Blend together mayonnaise, sour cream, sugar, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and cinnamon. Chill.
3. Drain pineapple well, wash grapes, and combine with pineapple. Chill.
4. Just before serving, wash, core, and slice apples into thin slices. Add apples to the mixture of grapes and pineapple. Toss gently to mix well.
5. Mix in the shredded cabbage. Toss again to blend thoroughly.
6. Add dressing gradually until the salad is evenly coated. This variation differs slightly from traditional coleslaw but is equally delicious and easy to prepare. Prepare the ingredients ahead of time, then assemble the salad whenever desired.
